intro: I offer two kinds of work: hands-on product builds I ship personally, and access to NexGuild's verified contributor network for teams that need human-powered work done at scale.

personal.title: AI-Powered Web Platform Building
personal.description: Full-stack platforms architected and shipped end-to-end — auth, database, admin panels, and everything between.

personal.title: Automated Content Website Development
personal.description: AI-driven content pipelines that generate, publish, and monetize — the same system running StarScoopDaily.

personal.title: Free Tools Website Development
personal.description: Multi-tool platforms built for organic SEO traffic, no paywalls — the model behind xtoolkit's 44 tools.

personal.title: AI Feature Integration
personal.description: Adding LLM-powered features to an existing product — generation, detection, chat, or automation, wired in cleanly.

nexguild.title: AI Data Collection
nexguild.description: Structured data gathering at scale from a verified contributor network across India.

nexguild.title: Data Annotation & Labeling
nexguild.description: Accurate, human-reviewed annotation for training and evaluation datasets.

nexguild.title: Social Media Evaluation
nexguild.description: Quality, relevance, and policy evaluation of social content at volume.

nexguild.title: Content Moderation
nexguild.description: Human review of user-generated content against your policy guidelines.

nexguild.title: Survey & Research Tasks
nexguild.description: Structured surveys and research tasks completed by real, verified contributors.

nexguild.title: User Testing
nexguild.description: Real-user testing and structured feedback on products, flows, and interfaces.

nexguild.title: Quality Assurance
nexguild.description: Manual QA passes across products, content, and datasets before release.

nexguild.title: Image & Audio Labeling
nexguild.description: Human-labeled image and audio data for computer vision and speech models.

ctaBand.heading: Need human-powered digital work done fast?
ctaBand.body: NexGuild connects you with verified contributors across India.
